samples.input_source: In 1234 AR, Rebekah died of glotrot, and on her deathbed Resheph forgave her and absolved her of sin. He allowed her to be buried in the village of Ezra, outside the gate to the Tomb of the Eaters and beneath the shadow of the Spindle.
expected_japanese_contains: レシェフ
年、レベカはグロットロッ

samples.input_source: In 1234 AR, Resheph appointed Rebekah administrator of TestPlace1. She tendered alms for the sick in his name.
expected_japanese_contains: レシェフ
の施政官に任じた。彼女は

samples.input_source: Acting against a prohibition on the practice of worshipping the stars, Resheph led an army to the gates of Omonporch. There he defeated his brothers in battle and liberated its citizens, and they crowned him the sultan of Qud.
expected_japanese_contains: レシェフ
星々を崇める営みへの禁令

samples.input_source: In 1234 AR, Rebekah betrayed Resheph by stealing the Mark of Death from the gate to the Tomb of the Eaters. In punishment, Resheph excommunicated her from the sultanate.
expected_japanese_contains: レシェフ
年、レベカは喰らう者の墓

samples.input_source: In 1234 AR, Resheph cleansed the marshlands of the plagues of the Gyre and taught Abram to sow watervine along its fertile tracks.
samples.expected_japanese_exact: 1234年、レシェフは湿地帯よりジャイアの災厄を祓い、その肥沃なる道筋に沿ってワターヴァインを蒔く術をアブラムに授けた。

samples.input_source: In 1234 AR, Resheph closed the gates to the Tomb of the Eaters, abdicated the throne, and dissolved the sultanate in order to lift the curse of the Gyre.
expected_japanese_contains: レシェフ
年、レシェフはジャイアの

samples.input_source: In 1234 AR, Resheph, the Above, Ghost-in-Cerulean, the Coiled Lamb of Baetyls, died of natural causes. He was 216 years old.
expected_japanese_contains: レシェフ
年、レシェフ、天上なる者

samples.input_source: After conferring with mysterious strangers, Resheph convinced them to help him found a harborage for the purpose of receiving visitors from across the clustered cosmos. They named it Starfarer's Quay.
expected_japanese_contains: レシェフ
謎めいた異邦人らと協議し

samples.input_source: While traveling alone through the Rust Wells, Resheph came across a trove of gleaming stars in a bottle. From that day forth, he always kept some stardust on his person.
expected_japanese_contains: レシェフ
錆の井戸を独り旅せし折

samples.input_source: In 1234 AR, the Gyre widened, and the first triad of plagues afflicted the land. The water was poisoned with salt, girshlings ravaged the fruit and wheat, and tongues rotted away in the mouths of kith and kin. Resheph walked below the chrome arches and healed the sick.
expected_japanese_contains: レシェフ
年、ジャイアは広がり、第

samples.input_source: In 1234 AR, the Gyre widened, and the second triad of plagues afflicted the land. The legs of kith and kin annealed to iron, darkness bloomed from the earth, and the svardym blackened the sky. Resheph walked below the chrome arches and healed the sick.
expected_japanese_contains: レシェフ
年、ジャイアは広がり、第

samples.input_source: One starry evening, a babe was found swaddled with its mouth full of circuits by a group of baetyls in Red Rock. They took him into their fold and fostered him, and he became known as Resheph, the Coiled Lamb of Baetyls.
expected_japanese_contains: レシェフ
星降るある宵、赤岩にて

samples.input_source: At Starfarer's Quay, Resheph consulted with mysterious strangers and learned the secret of the Gyre. By cause of the misdeeds of the elder saads and sultans, star beings had levied a curse on Qud. Resheph vowed to make right from this wrong and redeem our doomed world.
expected_japanese_contains: レシェフ
星渡りの埠頭にて、レシェ

samples.input_source: While traveling near Bethesda Susa, Resheph lost control of his chariot and drove it off a cliff. Luckily, a local physician named Rebekah came to his rescue. Moved by her kindness, Resheph enrolled at a nearby hospice as her apprentice.
expected_japanese_contains: レシェフ
ベセスダ・スーサ近くを旅

samples.input_source: In 1234 AR, the Gyre widened, and the final plague afflicted the land. The Girsh Nephilim rose from their cradles on the Moon Stair and slouched toward Qud to eat its young. Resheph rose to meet them in battle and cast them back.
expected_japanese_contains: レシェフ
年、ジャイアは広がり、最

samples.input_source: At twilight in the shadow of the Spindle, the people of Omonporch saw an image on the horizon that looked like a ghost bathed in cerulean. It was Resheph, and after he came and left Omonporch, the people built a monument to him, and thenceforth called him Ghost-in-Cerulean.
expected_japanese_contains: レシェフ
薄暮、スピンドルの影にて

samples.input_source: In 3 BR, Rebekah died of glotrot, and on her deathbed Resheph forgave her and absolved her of sin. He allowed her to be buried in the village of Ezra, outside the gate to the Tomb of the Eaters and beneath the shadow of the Spindle.
expected_japanese_contains: レシェフ
年、レベカはグロットロッ

samples.input_source: After treating with the Farmers' Guild, Nuntu convinced them to help him found a workshop in Hinnom for the purpose of studying glass. They named it the Glass Workshop.
samples.expected_japanese_exact: 農夫ギルドとtreatingしたのち、NuntuはhimがHinnomにa workshopを創設する助力をするよう彼らを説得した。その目的はガラスのをstudyingことだった。彼らはそれをthe Glass Workshopと名づけた。

samples.input_source: In 1234 AR, a corrupt administrator was appointed minister of Salt Dunes. She outlawed the practice of glass-making, and Nuntu was forced to flee.
samples.expected_japanese_exact: 1234年、腐敗した施政官がSalt Dunesの大臣に任じられた。その者はglass-makingの営みを禁じ、Nuntuは逃亡を余儀なくされた。

samples.input_source: In 1234 AR, a corrupt administrator was appointed minister of Salt Dunes. She outlawed association with the Farmers' Guild, and Nuntu was forced to flee.
samples.expected_japanese_exact: 1234年、腐敗した施政官がSalt Dunesの大臣に任じられた。その者は農夫ギルドとの交わりを禁じ、Nuntuは逃亡を余儀なくされた。

samples.input_source: While wandering around Salt Dunes, Nuntu stumbled upon a clan of the Farmers' Guild performing a secret ritual. Because of his chromatic aura, they accepted him into their fold and taught him their secrets.
samples.expected_japanese_exact: Salt Dunesの辺りをさまよううち、Nuntuは秘密の儀式を行う農夫ギルドの一族に出くわした。his chromatic auraゆえ、彼らはhimを仲間に迎え入れ、himに彼らの秘密を授けた。

samples.input_source: In 5597 BR, Yarad, Hammer-in-Turquoise, the Ilep Sorrow, died of natural causes. He was 216 years old.
samples.expected_japanese_exact: 5597年、Yarad, Hammer-in-Turquoise, the Ilep Sorrowは自然の理により身罷った。享年216歳であった。

samples.input_source: In the High Salt Sun, Yarad, Hammer-in-Turquoise, the Ilep Sorrow laid his body to rest and crossed into Brightsheol. He was 216 years old.
samples.expected_japanese_exact: 高き塩の太陽、Yarad, Hammer-in-Turquoise, the Ilep Sorrowはその身を休め、ブライトシェオルへ渡った。享年216歳であった。

samples.input_source: In 5597 BR, it was discovered that Yarad II's death had been faked. Despite reports to the contrary, Yarad II was alive and well. She was known thenceforth as the Gleaming Ghost of Barracks District Temrir.
samples.expected_japanese_exact: 5597年、Yarad II's death had been fakedとの事実が明らかになった。相反する報告にもかかわらず、Yarad IIは健在だった。Yarad IIは以後the Gleaming Ghost of Barracks District Temrirとして知られるようになった。

samples.input_source: Look! Behold the Gleaming Ghost of Barracks District Temrir, who in the High Salt Sun defied death and emerged from the glassy ruins.
samples.expected_japanese_exact: 見よ、驚嘆せよ！ the Gleaming Ghost of Barracks District Temrirは高き塩の太陽に死を退け、glassy ruinsより現れた。

samples.input_source: One moonless night, a babe was found swaddled beneath the glass arch with jade eyes. That babe came to be known as Nuntu.
samples.expected_japanese_exact: One moonless night、ひとりの嬰児（with jade eyes）がbeneath the glass archにて産着に包まれて見いだされた。その嬰児はのちにNuntuとして知られるようになった。

samples.input_source: One dawn, a glassblower found a babe with silver hair outside her workshop. She and her fellow glassblowers adopted the babe and named him Nuntu.
samples.expected_japanese_exact: One dawn、ひとりのglassblowerが、her 工房の外でひとりの嬰児（with silver hair）を見いだした。Sheとherの同業のglassblowersはその嬰児を養子に迎え、himをNuntuと名づけた。

samples.input_source: One starless night, a babe was found swaddled with amber eyes by a group of Farmers' Guild in Salt Dunes. They took her into their fold and fostered her, and she became known as Mamon, Gleaming Scion of Farmers' Guild.
samples.expected_japanese_exact: One starless night、ひとりの嬰児（with amber eyes）がSalt Dunesにて、農夫ギルドの一団により産着に包まれた姿で見いだされた。彼らはherを仲間に迎えてherを育み、sheはマモン、農夫ギルドのGleamingなるScionとして知られるようになった。

samples.input_source: One starless night, a babe was found swaddled with amber eyes by a group of Farmers' Guild in Salt Dunes. They took her into their fold and fostered her, and she became known as Mamon, the Opal Lamb of Farmers' Guild.
samples.expected_japanese_exact: One starless night、ひとりの嬰児（with amber eyes）がSalt Dunesにて、農夫ギルドの一団により産着に包まれた姿で見いだされた。彼らはherを仲間に迎えてherを育み、sheはマモン、農夫ギルドのOpalなるLambとして知られるようになった。

samples.input_source: One rainy evening, a babe was found swaddled with quartz skin by a group of Mechanimists in Red Rock. They took him into their fold and fostered him, and he became known as Yarad, Chrome Child of Mechanimists.
samples.expected_japanese_exact: One rainy evening、ひとりの嬰児（with quartz skin）がレッドロックにて、メカニマス教団の一団により産着に包まれた姿で見いだされた。彼らはhimを仲間に迎えてhimを育み、heはYarad、メカニマス教団のクロームなる子として知られるようになった。

samples.input_source: One rainy evening, a babe was found swaddled with quartz skin by a group of Mechanimists in Red Rock. They took him into their fold and fostered him, and he became known as Yarad, the Argent Heir of Mechanimists.
samples.expected_japanese_exact: One rainy evening、ひとりの嬰児（with quartz skin）がレッドロックにて、メカニマス教団の一団により産着に包まれた姿で見いだされた。彼らはhimを仲間に迎えてhimを育み、heはYarad、メカニマス教団のArgentなるHeirとして知られるようになった。

samples.input_source: Nuntu was adopted by glassblowers who love glass-making.
samples.expected_japanese_exact: Nuntuは、glass-makingを愛するglassblowersに養子として迎えられた。

samples.input_source: One starry night in Salt Dunes, a healthy child was born to the sultan at Red Rock. At the moment of her birth, a glass comet crossed the sky, and in celebration the people danced in the streets. The babe was named Nuntu, but the people called her the Glassborn.
samples.expected_japanese_exact: One starry night、Salt Dunesのレッドロックにて、スルタンに健やかなる子が生まれた。herの誕生の瞬間、a glass comet crossed the sky、祝賀として民はdanced in the streets。その嬰児はNuntuと名づけられたが、民はherをthe Glassbornと呼んだ。

samples.input_source: Look! Behold the life of Nuntu -- called the Glassborn! -- scion of the Fossilized Saads and she who was dowered the Glass Crown. Observe the twin miracles of the High Salt Sun: the heiress was born, and a glass comet crossed the sky.
samples.expected_japanese_exact: 調べるよ！ Behold、Nuntuの生涯を。すなわちthe Glassbornと呼ばれし者、化石化せしサアドの裔にして、Glass Crownを授けられし者なり。高き塩の太陽の双つの奇跡を見よ。heiressが生まれ、そしてa glass comet crossed the sky。

samples.input_source: Under a glass eclipse, Nuntu cemented her friendship with glassblowers by marrying Arconaut's Hall.
samples.expected_japanese_exact: Under a glass eclipse、NuntuはArconaut's Hallと婚姻を結ぶことにより、glassblowersとのherの友誼を固めた。

samples.input_source: Under a glass eclipse, Nuntu cemented her friendship with Farmers' Guild by marrying Arconaut's Hall. In celebration, the Farmers' Guild bestowed upon Nuntu a wedding gift they called the Glass Torch.
samples.expected_japanese_exact: Under a glass eclipse、NuntuはArconaut's Hallと婚姻を結ぶことにより、農夫ギルドとのherの友誼を固めた。In celebration、農夫ギルドはNuntuに、彼らがthe Glass Torchと呼ぶ婚礼の贈り物を授けた。

samples.input_source: Blessed union, Nuntu and Arconaut's Hall, whose legendary alliance by marriage founded glassblowers' guildhalls.
samples.expected_japanese_exact: Blessed union、NuntuとArconaut's Hall、その伝説的な婚姻同盟はfounded glassblowers' guildhalls。

samples.input_source: In {{R|3}} AR, Resheph cleansed the marshlands of the plagues of the Gyre and taught Abram to sow watervine along its fertile tracks.
samples.expected_japanese_exact: {{R|3}}年、レシェフは湿地帯よりジャイアの災厄を祓い、その肥沃なる道筋に沿ってワターヴァインを蒔く術をアブラムに授けた。
